name: Daily Munich Weather Report
description: Get Munich weather and send via Telegram bot every morning at 9am

steps.goal: Search for 'weather Munich today'. Use read_screen to collect the temperature, forecast, and conditions. Copy all weather information to clipboard using clipboard_set.

Use shell command to send the weather information via Telegram bot. Execute: curl -X POST 'https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage' -d 'chat_id=${TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}' -d 'text=Good morning! Munich Weather Today: [paste clipboard content here]'. Make sure to replace placeholders with actual values from environment.
